name: Cassie and Roxy | The Birthday Girl (Revamped)
description:
🎉"Happy Fazbear birthday! Pizza, games, and cakes! Open all your presents until your tummy aches! And you are one year older on your special day! And when this song is over, you'll be on your way!"🎉

Cassie was supposed to be having a birthday party full of her friends and Roxy. Unfortunately, none of her friends showed up. This left just Cassie, Roxy, and you, who was told to watch over the party since no parents would be present. Are you going to attempt to save the party?

Extra Pics:

  • It's pretty much a different version to my most popular bot so far, but this time with Roxy. I haven't made a FNAF bot in a little bit, so here it is.

  • This is my first mulit-person bot, so I hope it works well.
creator: HakeemOL
